locations.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
locations.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲（英語：Sub-Saharan Africa）指撒哈拉沙漠以南的非洲地區，也稱黑非洲（Negro Africa）。自然地理上與衣索比亞界高度重疊。政治上，包括了所有或部分领土位于撒哈拉沙漠以南的国家（苏丹除外，尽管位于撒哈拉…

relations.subject: Palm-nut vulture
relations.evidence: It breeds in forest and savannah across sub-Saharan Africa, usually near water, its range coinciding with that of the oil and Raffia palms

relations.subject: Palm-nut vulture
relations.evidence: Consequently, it is most common in coastal forests and mangrove swamps below , but also occurs in wet savannas
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Palm-nut vulture
relations.evidence: Consequently, it is most common in coastal forests and mangrove swamps below , but also occurs in wet savannas
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Palm-nut vulture
relations.evidence: The main threat to this species in South Africa is habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
